sections.paragraph:
προσαίτης, ου, ὁ (Plut., Mor. 294a; Diog. L. 6, 56; Lucian, Navig. 24; cp. αἴτης· πτωχός Hesych. I 78) beggar Mk 10:46; J 9:8.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Diog. L. Diog. L. = Diogenes Laertius, III a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 876
